name: testEditBusinessUnit
description: Editing a business unit updates its name while preserving the same ID
descriptionHtml: Editing a business unit updates its name while preserving the same ID

steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: Editing a business unit updates its name while preserving the same ID

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Select '0717.195751 company for bu edit' company using filter
Fill in merchant name: 0717.195751 edited bu
Verify: the success alert is displayed with correct message
Verify: the Business Unit ID remains the same after editing name
